summary: Iteration 185: Tested redesigned Services, Expansion, and Earn/Affiliate public pages plus Track Order page. All pages render correctly with dark navy (#0E1A2B) hero sections matching landing page aesthetic. Backend track order endpoint working correctly. No vendor/marketplace/fulfillment partner language found on any public page.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages render correctly, all sections present, mobile responsive)

test_credentials: No login required - all pages are public
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 redesigned pages (Services, Expansion, Earn) and Track Order page are working correctly. Dark navy hero sections (#0E1A2B / rgb(14, 26, 43)) match landing page aesthetic. No vendor/marketplace/fulfillment partner language found. Track Order backend endpoint /api/orders/track/{order_id} returns 404 with 'Order not found' for non-existent orders as expected.
